label: PCF8576 Clock
info: Drives a 4-digit 7-segment LCD clock from a PCF8576 over I2C. An inject node fires every second, a function node converts the current time to four individual digits, and the periph-pcf8576 node writes the encoded bytes to the chip's display RAM. The chip handles AC drive waveforms internally — the host only writes segment data. With the demo's 9999-to-0000 countdown variant, the user can verify that all 20 segment positions update at the expected rate and that the chip is reliable over many writes.

name: extract HH:MM
